2605.07613.title: Intent-Driven Semantic ID Generation for Grounded Conversational News Recommendation
2605.07613.paper_summary: Conversational news recommendation requires grounding each suggestion in a rapidly evolving article corpus while addressing implicit user intents that lack explicit retrievable keywords. To characterize this scenario, we identify 6 intent types from production dialogues: five are implicit and pose fundamental challenges to standard RAG pipelines, forming a critical retrieve-first bottleneck. To address these issues, we introduce intent-driven Semantic ID (SID) generation under a Generate-then-Match paradigm. With two-stage training that consists of multi-task SID alignment and GPT-4 Chain-of-Thought distillation, an LLM maps diverse intents to hierarchical SID prefixes, which are then fuzzy-matched to the current news pool to guarantee fully grounded recommendations. Profile-Aware Dual-Signal Reasoning (PADR) further enables cold-start users to obtain valid recommendations using only profiles. On a mainstream Chinese news platform, our 7B model achieves 0% hallucination and 12.4% L1 match in the 152K open-generation SID space (4x random baseline). It matches GPT-4+Hybrid RAG on L1 while surpassing it on finer-grained metrics (L2 2x, Category +1.2pp) at ~100x lower cost. Cold-start users, where existing baselines score 0%, achieve 18.0% L1 (6x random), the highest among all user groups.
2605.07613.paper_summary_zh: 對話式新聞推薦需要將每個建議根植於快速發展的文章語料庫中，同時處理缺乏明確可檢索關鍵字的隱含用戶意圖。為了描述這種情況，我們從生產對話中識別出6種意圖類型：五種是隱含的，對標準的RAG管道構成根本挑戰，形成了一個關鍵的先檢索瓶頸。為了解決這些問題，我們在生成-然後-匹配的範式下引入了以意圖驅動的語義ID（SID）生成。通過包含多任務SID對齊和GPT-4思維鏈蒸餾的兩階段訓練，LLM將多樣的意圖映射到層次化的SID前綴，然後將其模糊匹配到當前新聞池，以保證完全根據的推薦。個人資料感知的雙信號推理（PADR）進一步使冷啟動用戶僅使用個人資料即可獲得有效推薦。在一個主流的中文新聞平台上，我們的7B模型在152K開放生成SID空間中實現了0%的幻覺和12.4%的L1匹配（4倍隨機基線）。它在L1上與GPT-4+混合RAG匹配，同時在更細粒度的指標上超越它（L2 2倍，類別+1.2pp），成本約低100倍。冷啟動用戶在現有基線得分為0%的情況下實現了18.0%的L1（6倍隨機），在所有用戶組中最高。
2605.07613.author: Hongyang Su et.al.
2605.07613.authors: Hongyang Su, Beibei Kong, Lei Cheng, Chengxiang Zhuo, Zang Li, Chenyun Yu
